                          RAP RAP RAP KAT ALP CHL ALP RAP JAX ALP BAR ALP EMB KAT JAX EMB EMB EMB EMB EMB PEN ALP EMB RAP RAP YIX EMB ALP EMB YIX YIX VIB PEN YIX PEN ALP GOR STA RAP YIX XOX XOX YIX SKY GOR STA GOR WUL GOR REN WIN SLO HEW SLO ALP XOX HEW HEW HEW SLO HEW WHO GOR SLO SLO JAX EGO TIT TIT GOR YIX TIT LAV ALP WHO DEE SWI SWI HEW SWI ONI GOR SWI ONI TIT SWI CAR GOF ONI CAR GOR HEW ARB YIX DEE CAR WIN PEN GOR TIT GOR HEW SWI EMB EGO SWI PEL WHO GOR HFM SWI EGO CAR PEL MIN ONI SQU GMO PEL PEL SWI SQU CHI XOX  XL KAN SWI SLO GOR EGO PEL KAN SLO SWI ANG XOX KAN CHI HIG SLO GOR HFM ZET CAR SWI HEW KAN GMO ZET OLE GMO EUL AMO AMO REN ANG ZET PEC HFM ZET JUD SPA KAN XOX HEW MON ALP SPA FIG SWI QME HEW DDQ PUR DJA LIC QME PUR PIS QME TRU NOE PUS GMO QME IMR NAB PUR PUR FAS PIS PIS PIS ZHO PIS DJA DDQ IMR LEO BRU
